ideation: This sequence simulates the sawing action using both arms. The left arm will hold the workpiece, while the right arm performs the sawing motion. To begin, the left arm will grip the workpiece at a comfortable angle, and the right arm will be positioned to begin the sawing action. As the sawing progresses, the right arm will move back and forth in a controlled manner, while the left arm remains relatively still to maintain stability. The sequence will conclude with both arms returning to a neutral position. This will provide a clear and effective visual representation of the sawing action.

frames.beat: left arm holds steady, right arm prepares to saw
right arm pulls back, starting the sawing motion
right arm pushes forward, completing the stroke
both arms reset, the cut is finished
